mode_of_action_summary: Combination of mesosulfuron methyl, florasulam and MCPA provides triple action through ALS inhibition and synthetic auxin effect, controlling grassy and broadleaf weeds including resistant phalaris minor.

active_ingredients.name: Mesosulfuron Methyl
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Controls grassy weeds by inhibiting amino acid synthesis

active_ingredients.name: Florasulam
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Controls broadleaf weeds by blocking cell division

active_ingredients.name: MCPA
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Causes uncontrolled growth in broadleaf weeds

weed_behavior.resistance_issue: Phalaris minor has developed resistance to many herbicides
weed_behavior.competition: Strong competition reduces wheat tillering and yield
weed_behavior.control_window: Best control at 2–4 leaf stage of weeds

urdu: گندم میں گلی ڈنڈا بہت ہے
جنگلی جئی کھیت میں پھیل گئی ہے
باتھو گندم کو دبا رہا ہے
punjabi: باتھو فصل نوں دبا رہیا اے

application_details.method: Uniform spray on actively growing weeds

critical_timing_warning: Do not spray after jointing stage
Late application may cause crop injury

resistance_management.advantage: Triple mode helps manage resistant weeds

safety: Avoid drift to nearby broadleaf crops
benefits: Better absorption due to OD formulation
farmer_benefits: گلی ڈنڈا مکمل ختم ہو جاندا اے
گندم دی ٹلرنگ بہتر ہندی اے

multilingual_description.english: Triple-action post-emergence herbicide for wheat controlling phalaris minor and broadleaf weeds.
multilingual_description.urdu: گندم کے لیے گلی ڈنڈا اور دیگر جڑی بوٹیوں کے خاتمے کے لیے بہترین دوا۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: گندم وچ گلی ڈنڈا تے چوڑی پتی جڑی بوٹیاں ختم کرن لئی زبردست سپرے۔

embedding_text: Wolf 25 OD herbicide contains mesosulfuron methyl florasulam and MCPA and is used in wheat for post emergence control of phalaris minor wild oats and broadleaf weeds. It works best at tillering stage and provides triple action weed control.
